mapper.sql: id, user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_type, related_id, created_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_type, related_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_type, related_id) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.type}, #{item.title}, #{item.content}, 0, #{item.relatedType}, #{item.relatedId})
